description.LOCATION_EN: Car parks at West Kowloon Cultural District

2024-12-15T16:03:00.CONTENT_EN: All car parks at West Kowloon Cultural District are full. Members of the public are encouraged to take public transport to the West Kowloon Cultural District.
2024-12-15T16:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 西九文化區內所有停車場現已泊滿車輛，前往西九文化區一帶的市民請使用公共交通工具。

2024-12-15T18:58:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Tseung Kwan O Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Hing Tin Estate is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-12-15T18:58:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，將軍澳道(往觀塘方向)近興田邨的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。
